shared_properties: Panel canvas stays 200x120px so end-state screens align to the same centered safe area as the pause overlay.
Typography aligns to the 8px HUD font scale for data fields and a larger pixel title treatment.
Muted dungeon palette keeps the background dark while key outcome text remains bright and legible.
differences: Panel includes SLIP DOWN title art, a survival time slot, a best record slot, and an R-key restart hint.
Outcome hierarchy emphasizes failure through darker border accents and restrained amber highlights.
Layout reserves dedicated value lanes for timer digits instead of mixing data directly into the title area.

context.usage: Centered end-state panel shown when player HP reaches zero.

shape.silhouette: Centered rectangular summary panel with title block, stat slots, and restart footer.
shape.collision_read: UI-only asset with no collision meaning.

acceptance_criteria: The panel contains separate visual lanes for title, current time, best record, and restart hint.
The restart hint remains readable while staying visually subordinate to the survival time value area.

reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds HUD contrast, muted dungeon palette, and low-saturation screen overlays for the active widget.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle for the summary frame with child atlas-driven digits and text labels.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer during the Loading state and cache the frame handle inside an end-state UI resource.
runtime_notes: Use Bevy 0.13 with ImagePlugin::default_nearest() so every asset stays pixel-perfect at 4x upscale.
Populate survival time and best record with atlas-driven digits sourced from the timer glyph set.
Toggle the panel visibility on game-over entry rather than rebuilding the UI tree.
